transformation_note: NUMBERING FRAME: keyed by djay session bar labels (host_measure = Skyfall djay bar) until corrected source grids exist; re-key to source-audio measure indices then. Anchor strategy: first metrically established downbeats aligned (djay: Skyfall bar 3 = In the End bar 1, so host = guest + 2 in this frame — user-attested; the earlier '+22' chorus-region observation was a local measure-number readout from a different numbering frame, not a rival alignment). Shared grid 74 BPM = host's corrected metrical tempo (djay initially read ~148, user-corrected; ~74-90 BPM region hypothesized viable, host character bounding above). Guest measured 105 BPM, slowed ~29.5% (74/105 ~= 0.705). Guest apparently +2 semitones (hypothesis; verify from session).

events: metrically ambiguous opening: an analyzer may count this as a measure, treat it as pickup material, or omit it from the regular grid
